name: kiwi-control-workspace
description: Kiwi Control workspace for a repo-first local control plane

scripts.build: npm run build -w @shrey-junior/sj-core && npm run build -w shrey-junior && npm run build -w @shrey-junior/sj-ui
scripts.audit: npm run build && node packages/sj-cli/dist/cli.js audit
scripts.check: npm run build && node packages/sj-cli/dist/cli.js check
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm test && bash scripts/smoke-test.sh && npm run release:manifest && npm run release:checksums
